business.title: AYE Finance Confirms No Deviation in IPO Proceeds Utilization for Q4FY26
business.description: AYE Finance Limited has submitted a statement to BSE Limited and National Stock Exchange of India Limited confirming no deviation or variation in the utilization of proceeds raised through its Initial Public Offer for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The company raised INR 710 Crores through a fresh issue on February 12, 2026, with CRISIL Ratings Limited appointed as the monitoring agency. The audit committee and auditors have provided nil comments on the utilization of funds.

science.title: The shocking origin of human eyes traces back to an ancient “cyclops”
science.description: A bizarre, cyclops-like creature from nearly 600 million years ago may hold the key to how your eyes—and even your sleep cycle—evolved. Scientists have discovered that all vertebrates, including humans, trace their vision back to a single light-sensitive “median eye” perched atop a worm-like ancestor’s head. As this ancient animal shifted from a sedentary to a more active lifestyle, it lost and then reinvented its vision, eventually giving rise to the paired, image-forming eyes we rely on today.
